                  +------------------[  Process  ]-------------------+
                  |                                                  |
                  |                +----------+                      |
                  |              +-+  Path 1  |<--+                  |
+----------+      | +-------+    | +----------+   |      +---------+ |      +---------+
|  Output  |<-------+  End  |<---+                +------+  Start  |<-------+  Input  |
+----------+      | +-------+    | +----------+   |      +---------+ |      +---------+
                  |              +-+  Path 2  |<--+                  |
                  |                +----------+                      |
                  +--------------------------------------------------+
